overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character walking through a New Orleans-inspired urban neighborhood at night. The character crosses streets and walks along sidewalks lined with historic buildings and parked vintage cars, encountering other pedestrians and light traffic under streetlights.

events.description: yellow vintage car drives past on the right side of the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the white-striped crosswalk from left to right, heading toward the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: yellow vintage sedan waiting at the intersection then driving past the character

entered.detail: two-story building with ornate iron balconies and lit windows
white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
1960s era yellow sedan with headlights on
tall streetlight illuminating the intersection with warm light

segments.scene_description: The character begins in the middle of a crosswalk at night, crossing an urban street intersection. A yellow vintage car passes by on the right as the character walks toward the sidewalk. Historic buildings with balconies line the left side of the street under clear night skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined residential sidewalk with parked vintage cars

events.description: character passes a pedestrian leaning against the wall on the right
character overtakes the pedestrian in brown jacket and hat walking ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone sidewalk, following and then passing a pedestrian in a brown jacket and hat

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket and hat walking ahead on the sidewalk, later overtaken by ego
woman leaning against the wall near a doorway

entered.detail: stone-tiled sidewalk with grass growing between cracks
vintage brown sedan parked along the curb
black metal trash receptacle on the sidewalk edge
mature trees with full green canopies lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a tree-lined sidewalk with parked vintage cars on the left. The pedestrian ahead in a brown jacket is overtaken midway through the segment. Street lamps cast shadows through the trees, and other pedestrians are seen leaning against walls or walking in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with stop sign and crosswalk

events.description: police car with flashing lights passes by on the left side of the street
character steps off the sidewalk onto the crosswalk to cross the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting briefly for traffic, then stepping onto the crosswalk to cross the street

notable_agents.action: police car driving down the street with headlights on
woman in black dress walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign at the intersection corner
ornate corner building with arched doorways and lit entrance
yellow and black vintage station wagon parked at the curb
black and white police sedan with roof lights

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection marked by a stop sign, passing a parked yellow station wagon. A police car drives by on the left as the character reaches the crosswalk. The character then steps onto the white-striped crosswalk to cross the street toward a lit corner building, while a pedestrian in a black dress walks toward the camera on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic urban neighborhood at night, transitioning from a busy street intersection to a quiet, tree-lined sidewalk and back into the flow of traffic. It begins with the character crossing a street intersection under a clear night sky, passing a yellow vintage car as they move toward a row of buildings with ornate balconies. As the character reaches the sidewalk, the scene shifts into a shaded pedestrian path where they overtake a person in a brown jacket while walking past parked vintage cars and street lamps casting long shadows through the trees. The camera then follows the character toward a stop sign and a parked yellow station wagon, just as a police car drives by on the left. Finally, the movement concludes as the character steps onto a white-striped crosswalk toward a lit corner building, passing a pedestrian in a black dress walking in the opposite direction.
